title: DualWield
description: A fork of DualWield by Ranull
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba9da4712bd3c519e1bb4a69f27aed5e74531bb.png) </br>
A lightweight and unintrusive plugin to add vanilla friendly attacking and mining with off-hand weapons and tools.</br>
## Credits
Ranull - Original plugin creator</br>
## Supports:

```
1.9.*, 1.10.*, 1.11.*, 1.12.*, 1.13.*, 1.14.*, 1.15.*, 1.16.*, 1.17.*, 1.18.*, 1.19.*, 1.20.*, 1.21.*
```

```
Spigot, Paper, Purpur (and more...)
```
### Compatibility:
This plugin should be compatible with all protection plugins, plugins that prevent damage events and block break events. It is also compatible with all third party enchantment and skill plugins like McMMO.</br>
</br>
Right click with a tool or weapon in your offhand to use the plugin</br>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2d7zeuqgrew" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</br>
<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
dualwield.attack (Default) - Allows a user to attack with offhand weapons</br>
dualwield.mine (Default) - Allows a user mine/chop/etc with offhand tools</br>
dualwield.reload (OP) - Allows a staff member to relaod the plugin</br>
</details>
</br>
